    <h1 class="title">
        <a href="https://every."> If SaaS Is Dead, <span class="hand hand-L">L</span>inear DidnвҖҷt Get the Memo</a>
    </h1>
      <h2 class="subtitle">
          <a href="https://every.">The product management tool has successfully reinvented itself as an agent-native business</a>
      </h2>
    <div class="post-meta">
        <p class="byline">by <a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BsYXVyYV8yN2JiYWZfMSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo0fQ==">Laura Entis</a></p>
    </div>
      <figure>
        <a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3lvdXR1LmJlLzhRY1c5LWRhbDBnIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjV9" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <span style="display:inline-block; position:relative;">
            <img class="post-cover" src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/8QcW9-dal0g/hqdefault.jpg" width="600" alt="Watch on YouTube">
            <span style="position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%, -50%);">
              <img src="https://every.to/play-solid-full.png" alt="Play" width="48" height="48" style="display:block; border:0;">
            </span>
            <span style="position:absolute; bottom:18px; right:18px; display:inline-block; padding:6px 10px; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.55); border-radius:22px;">
              <img src="https://d24ovhgu8s7341.cloudfront.net/static/emails/youtube-logo.png" alt="YouTube" width="88" height="24" style="display:block; border:0;">
            </span>
          </span>
        </a>
          <figcaption>Midjourney/Every illustration.</figcaption>
      </figure>
  </div>

  <div class="post-body">
    <p><em>Was this newsletter forwarded to you? <u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2FjY291bnQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6Nn0=" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Sign up</a></u> to get it in your inbox.</em></p>
<p></p>
<hr class="quill-line">
<p></p>
<h2><strong>вҖҳAI &amp; IвҖҷ: Slowing down to speed up </strong></h2>
<p>Today, weвҖҷre releasing a new episode of our podcast<em> <u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL3BvZGNhc3QiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6N30=" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">AI &amp; I</a></u></em><strong>. <u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BkYW5zaGlwcGVyIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjh9" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Dan Shipper</a></u></strong> sits down with <strong>Karri Saarinen</strong>, cofounder and CEO of Linear, a product management tool designed for agent-native software development, to discuss what the вҖңSaaS is deadвҖқ narrative gets rightвҖ”and wrongвҖ”and why conviction can be the best product strategy.</p>
<p>Watch on <a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">X</a> or <u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3lvdXR1LmJlLzhRY1c5LWRhbDBnIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjEwfQ==" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">YouTube</a></u>, or listen on <u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Spotify</a></u> or <a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Apple Podcasts</a>. You can also read <a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">the transcript</a>.</p>
<p>Here are the highlights:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<strong>Just because the technology has changed doesnвҖҷt mean your mission should. </strong>Founded in 2019, Linear is the rare company that started pre-ChatGPT to have successfully reinvented itself as <u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2d1aWRlcy9hZ2VudC1uYXRpdmUiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTR9" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">an agent-native business</a></u>. Saarinen attributes LinearвҖҷs success to never losing sight of what itвҖҷs always cared about: helping companies build great software. Whereas competitors chased AI trends, Linear focused on understanding how the technology was impacting customersвҖҷ workflows, and updating its service accordingly. </li>
<li>
<strong>SaaS winners are building for agents. </strong>Linear started as an excellent product management tool for humans. Opening up the tool to agents instantly increased the available user base. Today, agents are first-class users inside of Linear, and companies like OpenAI and Coinbase are using its platform to manage their own agents. </li>
<li>
<strong>Speed means decisions matter more, not less. </strong>AI makes it easy to have an idea and build it without considering whether it justifies its existence. When ChatGPT was released, SaaS companies were launching their own chatbots left, right, and center. Instead of jumping on the bandwagon, Linear stopped to consider whether the application was useful. Turns out it really wasnвҖҷt, Saarinen says, a realization that freed up resources to focus on what mattered, like making it easy for humans and agents to collaborate on software development. </li>
</ul>
<p>Miss an episode? Catch up on DanвҖҷs recent conversations with LinkedIn cofounder <strong><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Reid Hoffman</a></u></strong>; the team that built Claude Code, <strong><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Cat Wu</a></u></strong><u> <a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">and</a> </u><strong><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Boris Cherny</a></u></strong>; Vercel cofounder <strong><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Guillermo Rauch</a></u></strong>; podcaster <strong><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Dwarkesh Patel</a></u></strong>; and others, and learn how they use AI to think, create, and relate.</p>  <div class="ea-block normal">
      <h4 class="ea-block-label"></h4>
      <div class="ea-block-inner">
<div class="quill-block-image" id="quill-block-image-1774553647789" data-source='{"dom_id":"quill-block-image-1774553647789","link":"https://bolt.new/?source=post_button","image":"https://d24ovhgu8s7341.cloudfront.net/uploads/editor/advertisements/1048/optimized_c0bd23eb-e3c3-4545-be4d-98e329a629af.png","caption":null,"error":null}'><div><a href="https://every." target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" data-advertisement-id="1048"><img src="https://d24ovhgu8s7341.cloudfront.net/uploads/editor/advertisements/1048/optimized_c0bd23eb-e3c3-4545-be4d-98e329a629af.png" alt="Uploaded image" width="600"></a></div></div>
<h4><strong>Generate designs that actually work</strong></h4>
<p>Ever come up with a brilliant design using an AI tool but have it break the moment engineering gets to it? Try Bolt.new. Its Design System Agent uses your NPM packages, CSS files, and component library to build designs that use real components that your engineers can integrate into your codebase. They actually work. These arenвҖҷt generic approximations: Your prototype is the product.</p>
<div class="quill-button" data-source='{"id":"quill-button-1774553777349","text":"Try it at bolt.new","url":"https://bolt.new/?source=post_button"}' id="quill-button-1774553777349"><a href="https://every." data-advertisement-id="1048">Try it at bolt.new</a></div>
</div>
      <div class="ea-block-footer">
        <a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJtYWlsdG86c3BvbnNvcnNoaXBzQGV2ZXJ5LnRvIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjIzfQ==">Want to sponsor Every? Click here</a><span>.</span>
</div>
  </div>
<h2><strong>Dissecting Claude Code</strong></h2>
<p>On Tuesday, Anthropic inadvertently leaked the entire source code for Claude Code. Naturally, Cora general manager Kieran was curious to see what was happening under the hood. </p>
<p>In an impromptu livestream, Kieran dug deep into how Claude Code works, unpacking its approach to memory, tools, skills versus slash commands, and prompt structure. </p>
<p>Here are three things he found particularly interesting: </p>
<ul>
<li>
<strong>Kairos, one of Claude CodeвҖҷs most advanced and autonomous features. </strong>ItвҖҷs often called вҖңAssistant Mode.вҖқ Where the standard command line interface waits for you to type, Kairos represents a shift to a proactive, always-on background assistant that keeps running when you leave your laptop. (The name Kairos is ancient Greek for вҖңopportune moment.вҖқ) ItвҖҷs currently internal-only at Anthropic, but the infrastructure is fully built.</li>
<li>
<strong>The вҖңBuddyвҖқ companion. </strong>Similar to Kairos, the infrastructure for Buddy is built, but not yet shipped to users. Buried inside the source code is a virtual pet for your command line. Each Buddy has its own species, personality stats (including ones called CHAOS and SNARK), and little ASCII art animations that respond to what youвҖҷre doing. KieranвҖҷs a chaos snailвҖ”take from that what you will. </li>
<li>
<strong>AutoDream, ClaudeвҖҷs nightly closet clean. </strong>This was the feature that most impressed Kieran. ItвҖҷs a background process that runs when you go idle and consolidates everything that happenedвҖ”daily logs, session notesвҖ”into a better-performing memory for when you come back. Kieran says this is the first <u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2d1aWRlcy9jb21wb3VuZC1lbmdpbmVlcmluZyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoyNH0=" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">compound engineering-style</a></u> capability heвҖҷs seen built into the Claude Code, referring to his philosophy of AI-native software engineering, where each session makes the next one easier. While heвҖҷs already been doing this manually, AutoDream is AnthropicвҖҷs first move to baking this into Claude Code by default. </li>
</ul>
<p><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3guY29tL2kvYnJvYWRjYXN0cy8xQXhSbmFZemphVnhsIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjI1fQ==" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Watch the full investigation</a></u>. </p>
<div class="quill-block-image" id="quill-block-image-1775053108265-y5ozvzhxx" data-source='{"dom_id":"quill-block-image-1775053108265-y5ozvzhxx","link":"https://d24ovhgu8s7341.cloudfront.net/uploads/editor/posts/4094/optimized_17343ea8-3960-4b8d-9630-6a4d60e759c4.png","image":"https://d24ovhgu8s7341.cloudfront.net/uploads/editor/posts/4094/optimized_17343ea8-3960-4b8d-9630-6a4d60e759c4.png","caption":"Dan had some questions. (Screenshot courtesy of Kieeran Klaassen.)","error":null}'><div>
<a href="https://every." target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><img src="https://d24ovhgu8s7341.cloudfront.net/uploads/editor/posts/4094/optimized_17343ea8-3960-4b8d-9630-6a4d60e759c4.png" alt="Dan had some questions. (Screenshot courtesy of Kieeran Klaassen.)" width="600"></a><figcaption class="quill-image-caption">Dan had some questions. (Screenshot courtesy of Kieeran Klaassen.)</figcaption>
</div></div>
<h2><strong>Log on</strong></h2>
<p>We host<a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2V2ZW50cyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoyN30=" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> </a><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2V2ZW50cyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoyOH0=" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">camps and workshops</a></u> on topics like<a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> </a><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">compound engineering</a></u> and<a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> </a><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">writing with AI</a></u> to share the knowledge weвҖҷve acquired from training teams at companies like the<a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> </a><em><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">New York Times</a></u></em><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> and leading hedge funds</a></u>, and by learning and playing with AI every day ourselves.</p>
<p><strong>This weekвҖҷs camp</strong></p>
<ul><li>
<strong><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Every x Notion | Custom Agents Camp</a></u></strong>: A free workshop where we demo the custom agents running EveryвҖҷs daily operations. WeвҖҷll be joined by Notion product designer <strong>Brian Lovin</strong>, who will show how the team behind custom agents uses them and what theyвҖҷre building next. The event takes place on Friday, April 3, at 12 p.m. ET. This camp is sponsored by Notion.</li></ul>
<p><strong>Upcoming courses</strong></p>
<ul><li>
<strong><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Claude Code for Absolute Beginners</a></u> </strong>(April 14): This beginner-friendly, live workshop led by<a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BtaWtlXzIxMTQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6Mzh9" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> </a><strong><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BtaWtlXzIxMTQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6Mzl9" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Mike Taylor</a></u></strong>, EveryвҖҷs head of tech consulting, is designed to get you from zero to a working project with Claude Code.</li></ul>
<p><strong>Recordings you may have missed</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>
<strong>EveryвҖҷs Q2 Demo Day</strong>: The Every team shares what weвҖҷve been building, including a walk-through of <strong><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL3BsdXMtb25lIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjQwfQ==" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Plus One</a></u></strong>, our hosted AI agent that lives in Slack.<a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2V2ZW50cy9xMi0yMDI2LWRlbW8tZGF5IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjQxfQ==" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> </a><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2V2ZW50cy9xMi0yMDI2LWRlbW8tZGF5IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjQyfQ==" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Watch the recording</a></u> or <u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">read the write-up</a></u>.</li>
<li>
<strong>Compound Engineering Cam</strong>p:<a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2NvcmEuY29tcHV0ZXIvIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjQ0fQ==" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> </a><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2NvcmEuY29tcHV0ZXIvIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjQ1fQ==" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Cora</a></u> general manager <strong><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BraWVyYW5fMTM1NSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo0Nn0=" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Kieran Klaassen</a></u></strong> walks through, step by step, how to go from prompt to working app in under an hour using the<a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> </a><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">compound engineering</a></u> plugin.<a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> </a><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Watch the recording</a></u> or<a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> </a><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">read the write-up</a></u>.</li>
<li>
<strong>OpenClaw Camp</strong>: The Every team walks through<a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2d1aWRlcy9jbGF3LXNjaG9vbCIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo1M30=" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> </a><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2d1aWRlcy9jbGF3LXNjaG9vbCIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo1NH0=" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">OpenClaw</a></u>, showing how to set it up and our favorite use cases.<a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2V2ZW50cy9vcGVuY2xhdy1jYW1wIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjU1fQ==" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> </a><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL2V2ZW50cy9vcGVuY2xhdy1jYW1wIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjU2fQ==" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Watch the recording</a></u> or<a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> </a><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">read the write-up</a></u>.</li>
</ul>
<h2><strong>What EveryвҖҷs creative director says about Google Stitch </strong></h2>
<p>When a major update to Google Stitch was released a couple of weeks ago, the consensus on Twitter was that the вҖңvibe designвҖқ platform spelled the end for art directors. Why hire a human when AI can do the job in a fraction of the time, at a fraction of the cost? </p>
<p><strong><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BsdWNhc2NyZXNwbyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo1OX0=" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Lucas Crespo</a></u></strong>, EveryвҖҷs creative director, <u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">has an opposite read</a></u>: As AI homogenizes the web, designers are more important than ever. </p>
<p>Tools like Google Stitch allow anyone to produce a polished, competent app. They create digital products that look good, but may not meet the standards of professional designers. вҖңBut it makes people more comfortable saying, вҖҳThis is good enough,вҖҷвҖқ Lucas says. вҖңGood enough is not the thing that will make something stand out or make a difference when every website looks the same. You have to go above and beyond that, which will always require some unique angle or idea or imagination. ItвҖҷs not something IвҖҷve seen any model output yet.вҖқ</p>
<p>Lucas draws inspiration from being a person in the worldвҖ”walking through the park on a windy day, the fizz of receiving a party invitationвҖ”not from whatвҖҷs on his screen. The goal is to produce work that <u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">evokes precise emotions</a></u>.</p>
<p>The redesign for <strong><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2NvcmEuY29tcHV0ZXIvIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjYyfQ==" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Cora</a></u></strong>, EveryвҖҷs email management system, is built around вҖңthe feeling of sitting on the shoreline in front of a body of water, looking at the horizon where you can see the gradients in the sky changing during sunset and sunrise,вҖқ Lucas says. The vision cascades into the hundreds of user experience, color, and typography decisions that create the final product. вҖңYouвҖҷre going to think about nature. YouвҖҷre going to start thinking about fresh air,вҖқ he says. вҖңBut it has to start with the point of view.вҖқ</p>
<p>Writing works the same way. <strong><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BtYXJjdXNfZmQ4MzAyXzEiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6NjN9" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Marcus Moretti</a></u></strong>, general manager of <strong><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3dyaXRld2l0aHNwaXJhbC5jb20vIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjY0fQ==" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Spiral</a></u></strong>, EveryвҖҷs AI writing assistant, begins a draft knowing вҖңabout 30 percentвҖқ of what he wants to say. This might be a scene he canвҖҷt stop thinking about or an argument he hasnвҖҷt found the right words for yet. Spiral helps him with the mechanics: structure, pacing, and filling in the connective tissue. In his experience, however, the remaining 70 percent canвҖҷt be prompted into existence. вҖңYou figure out the rest by writing.вҖқ</p>
<p>For careful readers, itвҖҷs easy to spot when a writer has outsourced that process to an LLM.  While not always apparent on the sentence or paragraph level, longform AI writing drifts without constant human oversight. Arguments and scenes that look like insight collapse upon a closer read.</p>
<p>Maybe this is why AI tools tend to impress people who are new to a discipline the most. If youвҖҷve never written code, vibe coding feels like magic. For engineers, there are caveats. Lucas notices the same pattern on his feed: When a new AI design tool drops, the people most blown away вҖңare usually not the designers I admire,вҖқ he says. </p>
<p>Whereas non-designers see a shortcut to creative genius, Lucas sees a useful tool that still requires hundredsвҖ”potentially thousandsвҖ”of decisions before the output meets his own exacting standards.</p>
<p>AI has raised the floor. It can raise the ceiling, too, making it easier to execute work built on a singular vision. But it cannot generate that vision for you.</p>
<p></p>
<hr class="quill-line">
<p></p>
<p><strong><em><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL0BsYXVyYV8yN2JiYWZfMSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo2NX0=" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Laura Entis</a></em></strong><em> is a staff writer at Every. You can follow her on <a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5saW5rZWRpbi5jb20vaW4vbGF1cmFlbnRpcy8iLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6NjZ9" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>. <p><em>We <u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2V2ZXJ5LnRvL3N0dWRpbyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo3MH0=" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">build AI tools</a></u> for readers like you. Write brilliantly with <u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3dyaXRld2l0aHNwaXJhbC5jb20vIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjcxfQ==" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Spiral</a></u>. Organize files automatically with </em><strong><em><u><a href="https://every." rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Sparkle</a></u></em></strong><em>. Deliver yourself from email with <u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2NvcmEuY29tcHV0ZXIvIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjczfQ==" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Cora</a></u>. Dictate effortlessly with </em><strong><em><u><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL21vbm9sb2d1ZS50by8iLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6NzR9" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Monologue</a></u></em></strong><em>. Collaborate with agents on documents with </em><strong><em><a href="https://every.to/emails/click/f91b1e00930c1c7802951fb76da18da9d1d86023a9ec7b653e47ca1b5d584dbf/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiIElmIFNhYVMgSXMgRGVhZCwgTGluZWFyIERpZG7igJl0IEdldCB0aGUgTWVtbyIsInBvc3RfaWQiOjQwOTQsInBvc3RfdHlwZSI6InBvc3QiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5wcm9vZmVkaXRvci5haS8iLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6NzV9" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Proof</a></em></strong><em>. </em></p>
